title: thesium grandiflorum
intro: Thesium grandiflorum, also known as the woolly thyme or woolly false thyme, is a flowering plant species found in the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, pinkish-white flowers and woolly leaves. The medicinal properties of Thesium grandiflorum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Thesium grandiflorum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Thesium grandiflorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
